title: INfinance
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: ‘It’s a life-changing sum’: Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance to support political causes I vehemently oppose?
items.description: ”I would hate for our money to end up in the hands of organizations that oppose everything we have supported throughout our lives.”

items.title: ‘I feel the clock ticking’: My wife and I are in our 60s — and employ 48 people in a small town. Can we ever retire?
items.description: “We could survive financially, but my people would not.”

items.title: ‘Am I crazy?’ My boyfriend’s parents say he doesn’t earn enough to marry me. Who is to blame here?
items.description: The Moneyist: “I have a Valentine’s message for you, but you won’t read it in a Hallmark card.”

items.title: ‘I’m close to retiring’: I’m behind on my property tax. Is this a really bad time to sell my house?
items.description: “I’ve never been late on a mortgage, so this makes me nervous.”

items.title: ‘I’m a loner’: I’m 62 with a multimillion-dollar portfolio and no heirs. Should I find a wife for my twilight years?
items.description: “I have never been married, have no siblings, and both my parents have passed away.”

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

items.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
items.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...
